summary: User can delete their associated data.
description:
As a user, I want to permanently delete all personal data associated with my account so that I have full control over my privacy.
Acceptance Criteria
Given I am logged in, when I request data deletion, then I am shown a confirmation dialog that clearly states the action is irreversible.

After confirming, all personal data (profile, conversations, preferences) is deleted within 30 days.

I receive an email confirmation once the deletion is complete.

I cannot log in with the deleted account after the deletion is processed.

linked_issues.summary: Verify confirmation dialog appears when requesting data deletion
Verify user cannot log in after account deletion is processed
Verify receipt of email confirmation upon completion of data deletion
